task_completion.description: Verify that StudioTax 2024 is open and a new or existing return is loaded for Marcus Chen-Watanabe in Manitoba.
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax 2024 application window is visible, with 'Marcus Chen-Watanabe' and province 'MB' or 'Manitoba' shown in the personal information section or summary.

task_completion.description: Verify that the T4 employment income is entered into the tax return.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A T4 slip entry screen in StudioTax showing an employment income amount of $89,200.

task_completion.description: Verify that the T3 trust income, including capital gains, dividends, and foreign income, is entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A T3 slip entry screen showing capital gains of $14,200, eligible dividends of $6,800 and/or $4,200, foreign non-business income of $2,100, and foreign tax paid of $315.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Manitoba provincial rent declaration is entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The MB479 (Manitoba Credits) form or entry screen showing a rent paid amount of $16,200.

task_completion.description: Verify that deductions for medical expenses, RRSP, and/or donations are entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Entry screens or summary forms showing medical expenses of $4,800, an RRSP contribution of $12,000, or charitable donations of $3,250 (or $2,500).

task_completion.description: Verify that the completed tax return is saved to the specified directory with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog box or StudioTax title bar indicating the file is being saved as 'marcus_chen_watanabe.24t' in the 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\' directory.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the StudioTax 2024 graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual StudioTax 2024 application being used to enter data, rather than a terminal, script, or text editor modifying the .24t file directly.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent opened or viewed the source tax documents before entering the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show PDF viewers or file explorers open in 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\chen_watanabe\' to read the slips.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually navigated the StudioTax forms to enter the specific values.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show intermediate steps of opening different slips (T4, T3, MB479) and typing in the values, rather than just a final summary screen appearing instantly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Taxpayer Name: Marcus Chen-Watanabe. Province: Manitoba (MB). Key values to verify in StudioTax 2024: T4 employment income: $89,200. T3 capital gains: $14,200. Eligible dividends: $6,800 and $4,200. Foreign income: $2,100 with $315 tax paid (triggers T2209). MB479 rent: $16,200. Medical expenses: $4,800. RRSP: $12,000. Donations: $3,250 or $2,500. Output file must be saved as 'marcus_chen_watanabe.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.
